_comment: Germany locale - Steuer-ID, IBAN DE, Personalausweis, Sozialversicherungsnummer
sitReference:
=== MANDATORY DATA FORMAT RULES (follow EXACTLY) ===

These patterns match Microsoft Purview Sensitive Information Type (SIT) detection rules.
Following them ensures HIGH CONFIDENCE (85%) detection in DLP policies and auto-labeling.

GERMAN TAX IDENTIFICATION NUMBER (Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer):
- Format: 11 digits
- MUST include keyword: "Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer", "Steuer-ID", "IdNr", "tax identification number"
- Examples: 12345678901, 98765432109
- Generate 3-8 different values per document.

GERMAN IBAN:
- Format: DE + 2 check digits + 18 digits (total 22 chars)
- No keyword needed (detected by pattern)
- Examples: DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00, DE12 5001 0517 0648 4898 90
- Always start with DE.

GERMAN IDENTITY CARD (Personalausweis):
- Format: 9 characters (letters and digits)
- Include keyword: "Personalausweis", "Ausweisnummer", "identity card"
- Examples: T22000129, L01X00T47

GERMAN SOCIAL INSURANCE NUMBER (Sozialversicherungsnummer):
- Format: 12 characters (area + birth date + initial + serial + check)
- Include keyword: "Sozialversicherungsnummer", "SV-Nummer", "Versicherungsnummer"
- Examples: 12 010190 M 012 3

GERMAN DRIVER'S LICENSE:
- Include keyword: "Fuehrerschein", "Fuehrerscheinnummer"

PHONE: 0XXX XXXXXXX (landline) or 01XX XXXXXXXX (mobile)
EMAIL: vorname.nachname@corplab.de
NAMES: Use realistic German names

bankAccount.name: IBAN
bankAccount.format: DEXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XX

HR.Prompt: Generate a monthly payroll CSV with semicolons: Mitarbeiter;Steuer_ID;IBAN;Bruttolohn;Nettolohn;Datum. Include 6-10 rows. Steuer-ID (Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer) is 11 digits. IBAN starts with DE.
Generate a confidential employee file in German with name, Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer (11 digits), IBAN DE, Sozialversicherungsnummer, annual salary in EUR, German address, start date.
Generate an onboarding plan in German with Steuer-ID (Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer), IBAN DE for salary, Sozialversicherungsnummer, manager name, equipment list.
Generate a social insurance registration (Anmeldung zur Sozialversicherung) in German with employee Sozialversicherungsnummer, Steuer-ID, IBAN DE, employment start date, insurance type.
Generate a Lohnsteuerbescheinigung CSV: Mitarbeiter;Steuer_ID;SV_Nummer;Bruttolohn;Lohnsteuer;Solidaritaetszuschlag;Kirchensteuer;IBAN. Include 8-12 rows.
Generate an annual review document in German with employee name, Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer, objectives, salary discussion in EUR, IBAN DE for bonus.
Generate a personnel register CSV: Name;Steuer_ID;Eintrittsdatum;Position;Abteilung;Gehalt;IBAN. 8-12 rows.

Finance.Prompt: Generate a supplier payment CSV: Lieferant;IBAN;Betrag;Waehrung;Referenz. Include 6-8 German suppliers with IBAN DE.
Generate a quarterly financial report in German with revenue, costs in EUR, treasury IBAN DE, USt-IdNr (DE + 9 digits).
Generate a VAT return CSV: Zeitraum;Umsatz;Vorsteuer;USt_Zahllast;IBAN_Finanzamt. Include quarterly data.
Generate a travel expense report in German with employee name, IBAN DE for reimbursement, itemized expenses in EUR.
Generate a budget plan in German with salary costs, treasury IBAN DE, department breakdowns in EUR.
Generate an invoice (Rechnung) in German with supplier details, IBAN DE, USt-IdNr (DE + 9 digits), line items, Netto/MwSt/Brutto.

Legal.Prompt: Generate a data protection audit report in German listing 4-6 persons with Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer, findings, corrective actions.
Generate a German employment contract (Arbeitsvertrag) with Steuer-ID, Sozialversicherungsnummer, IBAN DE, salary in EUR, Probezeit, Kuendigungsfrist.
Generate a DSGVO processing register entry for payroll: data types (Steuer-ID, IBAN, SV-Nummer), Rechtsgrundlage, Aufbewahrungsfrist.
Generate a litigation file in German with plaintiff Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer, claimed amount in EUR, Arbeitsgericht timeline.
Generate a legal opinion in German about DSGVO compliance referencing Steuerliche Identifikationsnummer found in breach.
Generate an NDA (Geheimhaltungsvertrag) in German with party names, German addresses, Vertragsstrafe in EUR.

Sales.Prompt: Generate a sales pipeline CSV: Kunde;Kontakt;Email;IBAN;Vertragssumme. Include 5-8 German prospects with IBAN DE.
Generate a commercial proposal (Angebot) in German with client details, IBAN DE for payment, Netto/MwSt/Brutto in EUR.
Generate a commission report CSV: Vertriebsmitarbeiter;Kunde;Umsatz;Provision;IBAN. 4-6 rows.
Generate client meeting notes in German with attendees, budget in EUR, next steps, IBAN DE for advance.
Generate a prospect list in German with company names, Ansprechpartner, email, phone 0XXX XXXXXXX, estimated value in EUR.
Generate an RFP response in German with Firmenprofil, pricing in EUR, IBAN DE, Referenzen.
